In this crisis, composure is necessary.
column3: このききにあって、れいせいさがひつようだ。
column4: この危機にあって、冷静さが必要だ。

column1: Even in difficulty, don't lose hope.

column1: As far as he's concerned, this is his first failure.

column1: It's hotter than last year.

column1: That grade meets the passing standard.

column1: Lack of experience is no valid reason.

column1: That effort doesn't deserve the reward.

column1: It's not hard to imagine.

column1: Failure is unavoidable.

column1: I can't bear to say such a thing.

column1: There are so many things I can't bear to forget.
